name: Acapulco Chicken (En Escabeche)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Minced jalapeno chili with seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chicken broth and pickling spice in a heavy large saucepan for ten minutes. Strain and return liquid to the saucepan.
2. Add chicken, onion, vinegar, garlic, oil, and cumin to the pan.
3. Simmer over very low heat until the chicken is just cooked through, about ten minutes.
4. Transfer chicken and onions to a shallow dish.
5. Top with bell peppers and minced chili.
6. Boil the cooking liquid until reduced to 2/3 cup, about ten minutes.
7. Pour the reduced liquid over the chicken and let cool for 30 minutes.
8. Add cilantro to the chicken mixture.
9. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled, turning the chicken occasionally, about 4 hours (can be prepared one day ahead).
10. Slice the chicken and transfer to plates.
11. Top with marinated vegetables and some of the juices.
12. Pass tortilla chips for serving.
